creator: arne@Steinkamm.COM
text:
Jörg Pulz wrote:
"Both Lenovo branded controllers where sold in this state, so it seems one can't trust that newly sold controllers are working out of the box."

We are not 100% sure whether the cards were flashed (incorrectly?) by the service provider during the hardware installation or whether they were supplied that way by Lenovo.

We will see in the next few weeks whether all cards can be saved in the way Jörg documented.
My big thanks to Jörg in any case!
